The '''W-90 concussion rifle''', also called the '''LJ-90''', was a long-barreled [[Concussion rifle/Legends|concussion rifle]] manufactured by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] around the time of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].

==Description==
Although it used the same type of targeting scope mount as the [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]], it was less accurate and had a much longer effective firing range. This model of concussion rifle was used by [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]], who acquired it after he teamed up with [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], who would also use the same model of blaster rifle on occasion. This weapon created a shockwave upon firing, and was heavy and difficult to handle.<ref name="OFC54">[[Star Wars: The Official Figurine Collection 54|''Star Wars: The Official Figurine Collection'' 54]]</ref>

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This rifle is a minor modification of the WWII-era German [[Wikipedia:MG34|MG34]] machine gun. The same weapon was used as the basis of the [[DLT-19 heavy blaster rifle/Legends|DLT-19 heavy blaster rifle]]. Bounty hunter [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] is seen holding this rifle in several pre-production stills, but not onscreen.
